decks.notes: The deck focuses on aggressive strategies with a mix of creatures and spells to quickly overwhelm the opponent. It utilizes efficient creatures like Amped Raptor and Guide of Souls to apply pressure, while also disrupting the opponent's game plan with cards like Thalia, Guardian of Thraben and Static Prison. The inclusion of cards like Goblin Bombardment and Ajani, Nacatl Pariah provide additional reach and removal options. The mana base is optimized for consistent and fast plays, with a mix of fetchlands and dual lands to ensure the deck can cast its spells on curve.

The main concept of this Control-Stoneblade deck is to disrupt the opponent's strategy while effectively managing threats on the board. Key cards like Force of Will and Stifle allow for early interaction, while cards like Stoneforge Mystic and Batterskull provide a powerful win condition. The deck also utilizes powerful planeswalkers like Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student and Teferi, Time Raveler to control the game and gain card advantage. With a mix of counterspells, removal, and threats, this deck aims to outvalue and outmaneuver the opponent in a long game.

The main concept of this deck is to use the synergy between Goblin Engineer, Goblin Welder, and Aphetto Alchemist to constantly recur and exchange artifacts like Hawkeye's Bow and Skateboard for maximum value. The deck also aims to control the board with cards like Force of Will and Mishra's Bauble while utilizing cards like Emry, Lurker of the Loch and Urza's Saga to generate additional value. The inclusion of cards like Phyrexian Dragon Engine and Loki, God of Mischief adds another layer of threat and disruption to help secure victory through a powerful combo engine.

This deck focuses on utilizing lands as a resource to control the game and disrupt the opponent's strategy. By using cards like Thespian's Stage, Crop Rotation, and Exploration, the player can quickly assemble powerful land combos like Dark Depths to create game-winning threats. The deck also includes various utility lands like The Tabernacle at Pendrell Vale and Maze of Ith to control the board. With a mix of disruption cards like Pithing Needle and graveyard hate like Grafdigger's Cage, the deck aims to outvalue and outlast the opponent through land manipulation and control.

The key concept of this deck is to disrupt and control your opponent's game plan while deploying a quick and aggressive strategy of your own. Utilizing cards like Thoughtseize, Daze, and Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student to disrupt your opponent's hand and game plan, while deploying threats like Murktide Regent, Nethergoyf, and Kaito, Bane of Nightmares to quickly close out the game. The deck also includes disruption in the form of counterspells like Force of Will and Force of Negation, as well as removal spells like Fatal Push and Orcish Bowmasters to keep the opponent on the back foot.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly fill the graveyard with powerful creatures like Griselbrand and Archon of Cruelty using cards like Faithless Looting and Unmask, and then bring them back onto the battlefield with spells like Reanimate and Animate Dead. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with powerful threats early in the game, controlling the board with hand disruption spells like Thoughtseize and Cabal Therapy. Additionally, cards like Lotus Petal and Dark Ritual provide fast mana acceleration to help cast the big creatures ahead of schedule.

This deck focuses on assembling the Doomsday combo, utilizing Thassa's Oracle to win the game. The Fantasticar serves as a key piece in the combo, allowing for quick and efficient setup. The deck includes various card draw and disruption spells to help find and protect the combo pieces. It also features mana acceleration in the form of Lotus Petal and Dark Ritual to quickly combo off. Overall, the deck aims to quickly and efficiently win the game using the Doomsday combo with Thassa's Oracle.

This UWx Control deck focuses on utilizing counterspells, removal, and card draw to control the game and disrupt the opponent's strategy. The deck includes cards like Force of Will, Swords to Plowshares, and Stifle to deal with threats, while also running powerful planeswalkers like Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student and Phelia, Exuberant Shepherd to generate card advantage and provide additional control options. Murktide Regent offers a powerful threat to close out games, while the mana base includes fetch lands and dual lands to ensure consistent access to the necessary colors of mana.

The main concept of this deck is to control the board and disrupt the opponent's game plan while applying pressure with efficient creatures. Utilizing disruptive spells like Thoughtseize, Force of Will, and Daze to slow down the opponent's plays, while deploying threats like Murktide Regent and Nethergoyf to close out the game quickly. The inclusion of cards like Fatal Push and Orcish Bowmasters helps with removal and keeping the board clear. Overall, this deck aims to tempo out the opponent while maintaining a strong board presence.

Utilizing a combination of disruptive spells and efficient creatures, the deck aims to control the tempo of the game while applying pressure to the opponent's life total. The key strategy is to disrupt the opponent's game plan with cards like Thoughtseize and Force of Will, while deploying threats like Barrowgoyf and Murktide Regent to close out the game quickly. By combining aggression with disruption, the deck aims to keep the opponent on the back foot and ultimately emerge victorious in the battle of tempo and resource management.

The main focus of this Dimir Tempo deck is to disrupt the opponent's game plan through various forms of hand disruption like Thoughtseize and Inquisition of Kozilek, while also utilizing efficient removal spells like Fatal Push and Force of Will to control the board. The deck aims to maintain card advantage with cards like Brainstorm and Ponder, while also applying pressure with creatures like Murktide Regent and Orcish Bowmasters. Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student helps to dig for key cards, while Flow State can provide additional card advantage. The mana base is built to support the deck's aggressive tempo strategy.

This UWx Control deck focuses on disrupting opponents with counterspells like Force of Will and Spell Pierce, along with removal spells like Swords to Plowshares. The deck also utilizes cards like Brainstorm and Ponder for card selection and manipulation. It aims to maintain control of the game through card advantage and efficient removal, with cards like Teferi, Time Raveler and Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student providing additional utility. The deck also has win conditions in the form of creatures like Geist of Saint Traft and Murktide Regent, while using cards like Tune the Narrative to further enhance its game plan.

The key concept of this deck is to quickly fill the graveyard with powerful creatures such as Griselbrand and Archon of Cruelty, and then bring them back into play using cards like Reanimate and Shallow Grave. The deck also includes disruption spells like Thoughtseize and Unmask to disrupt the opponent's game plan, while also utilizing cards like Faithless Looting and Dark Ritual to help accelerate the reanimation process. A combination of graveyard manipulation, card draw, and powerful creatures makes this combo-reanimator deck a potent force in Legacy 1 vs 1 matches.

This deck focuses on assembling the combo pieces needed to win the game, with cards like Thoughtseize and Duress to disrupt the opponent's strategy. The key play involves using Doomsday to set up the win condition with Thassa's Oracle, while using cards like Lotus Petal and Dark Ritual to generate the necessary mana to execute the combo. The deck also includes protection with cards like Force of Will and Misdirection, as well as ways to dig for combo pieces with Brainstorm and Ponder. Overall, the deck aims to quickly assemble its combo and win the game before the opponent can respond effectively.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on quickly overwhelming your opponent with aggressive creatures like Voice of Victory, Amped Raptor, and Ocelot Pride, while disrupting their game plan with Thalia, Guardian of Thraben and Static Prison. Utilizing efficient removal spells like Swords to Plowshares and Ajani, Nacatl Pariah, along with the land destruction of Wasteland, this deck aims to control the board and push for quick victories. The inclusion of cards like Goblin Bombardment and Guide of Souls provide additional reach and value to close out games efficiently.

The deck focuses on quickly filling the graveyard with powerful creatures like Archon of Cruelty and Griselbrand, then using spells like Reanimate and Animate Dead to bring them back into play for a devastating combo. Thoughtseize and Force of Will help protect the combo pieces, while Careful Study and Brainstorm provide card selection and filtering. Atraxa, Grand Unifier and Raph & Mikey, Troublemakers add additional disruption and control elements to the strategy. The deck aims to win the game by overwhelming the opponent with huge creatures and powerful reanimation spells.
